rule.why_bad: Masks unexpected failures and makes recovery unsafe.

rule.desc: Empty catch blocks or ignoring errors.
rule.better: Log at boundary and rethrow or handle explicitly.

rule.desc: Throwing a new exception without the original cause.
rule.why_bad: Loses stack trace and root-cause context.

rule.desc: Using exceptions for normal control flow.
rule.better: Use conditionals or return types to model absence.
